task.title: Configure a Migration Workspace
task.shortdesc: Set up a repeatable workspace layout to inspect artifacts and rerun jobs with traceability.

prereq.p: Complete installation and identify the source package directory that you want to migrate.
For your first onboarding run, use docs-user as the package input to practice the full workflow.

step.cmd: Create a dedicated workspace for generated artifacts.
Run discovery and store the report in the workspace.
Normalize discovery output and generate a plan.

info.codeblock:
python3 -m dita_package_processor normalize \ --input build/discovery.json \ --output build/planning_input.json
python3 -m dita_package_processor plan \ --input build/planning_input.json \ --output build/plan.json

step.cmd: Run dry-run execution and persist an execution report for review.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor execute \ --plan build/plan.json \ --source-root /path/to/package \ --output build/target \ --report build/reports/execution-report-dry.json

result.p: Your workspace contains a complete artifact chain for diff, review, and change control: discovery.json, planning_input.json, plan.json, and execution-report-dry.json.
